# Workshop Directory

> Maintain a registry of approved external workshops and service providers for fleet maintenance, including contact details, service specialisations, pricing, performance ratings, and contract status.

**Category:** Workflow · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** fleet · vehicle · workshop · service-provider · maintenance · directory

## What this does

Maintain a registry of approved external workshops and service providers for fleet maintenance, including contact details, service specialisations, pricing, performance ratings, and contract status.

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **workshop_name** *(text, required)* — Workshop Name
- **legal_name** *(text, optional)* — Legal / Registered Name
- **registration_number** *(text, optional)* — Business Registration Number
- **contact_person** *(text, optional)* — Primary Contact Person
- **phone** *(phone, optional)* — Phone Number
- **email** *(email, optional)* — Email Address
- **address** *(text, optional)* — Physical Address
- **service_types** *(multiselect, required)* — Service Types Offered
- **vehicle_categories_supported** *(multiselect, optional)* — Vehicle Categories Supported
- **standard_labour_rate** *(number, optional)* — Standard Labour Rate (per hour)
- **currency** *(text, optional)* — Currency
- **contract_start_date** *(date, optional)* — Contract Start Date
- **contract_end_date** *(date, optional)* — Contract End Date
- **average_rating** *(number, optional)* — Average Performance Rating
- **total_services_logged** *(number, optional)* — Total Services Logged
- **notes** *(text, optional)* — Notes
- **status** *(select, required)* — Status

## What must be true

- **unique_name:** Workshop name must be unique in the directory
- **service_type_required:** At least one service type must be specified for a workshop to be registered
- **active_only_for_service:** Only workshops with Active status can be selected on maintenance log or service records
- **labour_rate_positive:** Standard labour rate must be positive if provided
- **blacklist_permanent:** A blacklisted workshop cannot be reactivated — a new record must be created if re-engagement is required
- **contract_dates_valid:** Contract end date must be after contract start date when both are provided
- **rating_scale:** Performance ratings are on a 1 to 5 scale; average_rating is computed from individual service ratings

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Workshop Blacklisted** — when status is suspended; fleet manager confirms permanent removal, then Workshop is permanently removed from the approved list; any pending service records must be reassigned.
- **Contract Expired** — when contract_end_date is set; days until contract_end_date is less than or equal to advance_notice_days, then Procurement manager is reminded to renew or terminate the workshop contract.
- **Workshop Suspended** — when status is active; fleet manager provides suspension reason, then Workshop is marked suspended; technicians cannot select it for new service records.
- **Workshop Rated** — when a service log entry references this workshop; a rating between 1 and 5 is submitted for the service, then New rating is incorporated into the workshop's average performance score.
- **Workshop Registered** — when workshop_name is unique; at least one service_type is provided, then Workshop is added to the approved directory and available for service record selection.

## Errors it can return

- `WORKSHOP_DUPLICATE_NAME` — A workshop with this name already exists in the directory.
- `WORKSHOP_NOT_ACTIVE` — The selected workshop is not currently active. Please choose an approved service provider.
- `WORKSHOP_INVALID_RATING` — Performance rating must be between 1 and 5.

## Connects to

- **vehicle-maintenance-log** *(recommended)* — Workshop records are referenced on each service log entry
- **scheduled-maintenance** *(optional)* — Scheduled maintenance tasks can be pre-assigned to a preferred workshop
